title: Puddle's Mace
description:
Makes the new mace look like an actual mace!

NOW WITH 3D!!!
body:
**REQUIRES** [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) **AND** [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
![the logos of two other mods and the text "required" below it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac59e1995ef618e71bed42c3a8891fa8441ca31b.png)

# Actual Mace

AM is a simple resource pack that replaces the mace item with a 3D model that makes it look like an actual mace, while still trying to make it look vanilla!

### Future Plans
Add different models for the different enchantments

Maintain the pack for more than a week
